caption: A man with a tall, silver, stylized wig, glasses, and headphones sits in a recording studio, wearing a white dress shirt with a red bow tie and light-colored suspenders. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and clothing items, including shirts with the "LEE" logo. A logo for "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST" is visible on the screen. Throughout the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing with his hand, shifting his facial expression and head position. While his overall posture remains relatively stable, he moves his arm and hand in front of him as he talks. The lighting is bright and consistent, and the background elements remain static while the man's movements provide the primary action in the scene.
